narrative: PRL parked: volume-weighted price held flat at $0.7878 (+0.32% 24h) as turnover cooled 35% to $65k across the same six Ethereum pairs — the market caught its breath after two days of double-digit swings. Bridge flows turned net-out for the first time tracked: custody slipped -474 PRL to 487,374 and minted WPRL -648 to 484,209, with surplus widening slightly to 0.65% as burns ran ahead of deposits. Network hashrate gave back -14.9% to 23.79 EH/s and block cadence eased to ~153s, with MinePRL GPU count drifting 29 → 26; difficulty has not yet reset to the lower power. The standout signal was social: pearl-research-labs/pearl picked up +16 stars in 24h to 187, the largest single-day jump of the month — early-stage attention building around the core repo.

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)
sources: pool.mineprl.com/v1/public/summary (network.height, network.block_reward_prl for circulating supply approximation)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: First net-outbound 24h tracked: custody -474 PRL and minted WPRL -648 PRL, on the back of the two-day mint catch-up. Surplus widened mildly 0.62% → 0.65%. Not a drain — within normal noise.
Volume cooled 35% ($99.6k → $65k) — six pairs steady, no venue dropout, just thinner tape after two days of swings.
Network hashrate -14.9% to 23.79 EH/s and pool GPUs 29 → 26; block time eased to ~153s as difficulty (0x18013665) has not yet retargeted to the lower power.
pearl-research-labs/pearl +16 stars in 24h to 187 — largest single-day star pickup of the month on the core repo.

social.summary: No coordinated chatter overnight; @prlnet and @pearlbridgexyz feeds remained quiet. The most concrete signal of attention is the +16-star burst on the pearl-research-labs/pearl core repo — organic interest landing on GitHub rather than X.

github.last_commit_msg: ux(RC5.36): hide slow-lane explainer when fast-lane has plenty of room
docs: tidy mirror references and audit attributions
fix(rpc): use chain.IsCurrent for getblocktemplate IBD check (#125)
